scripts.start:production: npm run tsc && EGG_SERVER_ENV=prod egg-scripts start --daemon --title=egg-server-assist-server
scripts.start:finup:test: npm run tsc && PLATFORM=finup:test egg-scripts start --daemon --title=egg-server-assist-server
scripts.start:finup:production: npm run tsc && PLATFORM=finup:production egg-scripts start --daemon --title=egg-server-assist-server
scripts.start:finup:production_gray: npm run tsc && PLATFORM=finup:production_gray egg-scripts start --daemon --title=egg-server-assist-server
scripts.start:renmai:production: npm run tsc && PLATFORM=renmai:production egg-scripts start --daemon --title=egg-server-assist-server
scripts.test: npm run lint -- --fix && npm run test-local
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run cov && npm run tsc
